vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó phát điên/cực kỳ khó chịu
vocab.example: Being stuck in a standstill during rush hour usually drives me up the wall, so I try to distract myself with music.

vocab.meaning: buộc phải dừng lại và chờ đợi (thường là một cách miễn cưỡng)
vocab.example: I often have to cool my heels in traffic for an hour, which I use as an opportunity to plan my day.

vocab.meaning: cùng hội cùng thuyền (ở trong cùng một tình cảnh khó khăn)
vocab.example: I look at the other drivers and realize we are all in the same boat, which helps me feel less frustrated about the delay.

vocab.word: at the end of one's tether
vocab.meaning: kiệt sức/hết sạch sự kiên nhẫn
vocab.example: By the time I finally exit a bottleneck, I'm often at the end of my tether due to the constant stop-and-go driving.
If I'm not the one driving, I take the chance to close my eyes and recharge my batteries before getting home.
